name: dsb-adp-roster-sync
title: DSB ADP Roster Sync
description: Authenticates to ADP Workforce Now via OAuth client_credentials + mTLS, paginates /hr/v2/workers, fetches per-worker detail for the agents we care about, and emits a normalized dataset (one item per agent) for n8n to upsert into the ROLI agents table. Used to auto-deactivate terminated agents and flag new sales hires.
